---
title: "ana_exp2"
author: "Shuyi Luo"
date: "01/04/2026"
output: html_document
---

```{R load libraries}
library(rjson)
library(reshape2)
library(lme4)
library(nlme)
library(lmerTest)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(Rmisc)
library(rstatix)
library(broom.mixed)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
library(ggpubr)
library(emmeans)
library(rlang)
library(readr)
library(ggeffects)
```

```{r load data}

df <- read_csv("study2_data_all.csv")

# session (TUS session): S = sham, D = IFS, H = HC
# time (rating time: 1 = pre, 2 = post
# l: rating of the experienced object
# un: rating of the inferred object
# baserate: 1 = low, 2 = high
# mag: outcome magnitude
# struct: trial condition, 1 = BB, 2 = UO, 0 = control

```
# 1. correlation between EXP and INF across sessions

```{R correlation between exp and inf}
compute_correlations_on_updates <- function(dfS,
                                            xvar = "un",
                                            yvar = "l",
                                            time1 = 1,
                                            time2 = 2,
                                            struct_val = 1,
                                            sessions = c("S","H","D"),
                                            outlier_thresh = 3,
                                            min_n = 3) {

  if (!is.data.frame(dfS)) stop("dfS must be a data.frame")

  df2 <- dfS %>%
    filter(
      as.character(time) %in% as.character(c(time1, time2)),
      as.character(struct) == as.character(struct_val),
      
      as.character(session) %in% as.character(sessions)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      subject  = as.character(subject),
      session  = as.character(session),
      baserate = as.character(baserate),
      time     = as.character(time),
      struct   = as.character(struct)
    )

  if (nrow(df2) == 0) stop("No data after filtering.")

  id_cols <- c("subject", "session", "baserate", "trial")

  x_t1 <- paste0(xvar, "_t", time1)
  x_t2 <- paste0(xvar, "_t", time2)
  y_t1 <- paste0(yvar, "_t", time1)
  y_t2 <- paste0(yvar, "_t", time2)

  wide_all <- df2 %>%
    select(all_of(id_cols), time, all_of(c(xvar, yvar)), struct) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = time,
      values_from = c(!!sym(xvar), !!sym(yvar)),
      names_glue = "{.value}_t{time}"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      delta_x = !!sym(x_t2) - !!sym(x_t1),
      delta_y = !!sym(y_t2) - !!sym(y_t1)
    ) %>%
    filter(!(is.na(delta_x) & is.na(delta_y)))

  # z-scores for filtering (within subject×session)
  wide_z <- wide_all %>%
    group_by(subject, session) %>%
    mutate(
      zx = (delta_x - mean(delta_x, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(delta_x, na.rm = TRUE),
      zy = (delta_y - mean(delta_y, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(delta_y, na.rm = TRUE),
      zx2 = (un_t2 - mean(un_t2, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(un_t2, na.rm = TRUE),
      zy2 = (l_t2  - mean(l_t2,  na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(l_t2,  na.rm = TRUE),
      zx1 = (un_t1 - mean(un_t1, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(un_t1, na.rm = TRUE),
      zy1 = (l_t1  - mean(l_t1,  na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(l_t1,  na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  wide_strict <- wide_z %>%
    filter(
      
      (is.na(zx2) | abs(zx2) <= outlier_thresh) &
      (is.na(zy2) | abs(zy2) <= outlier_thresh) &
      (is.na(zx1) | abs(zx1) <= outlier_thresh) &
      (is.na(zy1) | abs(zy1) <= outlier_thresh)  
    )

  wide_loose <- wide_z

  safe_cor <- function(d) {
    x <- as.numeric(d$delta_x)
    y <- as.numeric(d$delta_y)
    good <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
    xg <- x[good]; yg <- y[good]
    n <- length(xg)

    r_val <- NA_real_
    p_val <- NA_real_

    if (n >= min_n && sd(xg) > 0 && sd(yg) > 0) {
      ct <- tryCatch(cor.test(xg, yg, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE),
                     error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(ct)) {
        r_val <- unname(ct$estimate)
        p_val <- ct$p.value
      }
    }
    list(r = r_val, p = p_val, n = n)
  }

  subjects <- sort(unique(wide_all$subject))
  out <- vector("list", length(subjects))
  names(out) <- subjects

  for (s in subjects) {

    # --- compute strict for all sessions for this subject
    combos_sess <- wide_all %>% filter(subject == s) %>% distinct(session)

    strict_rows <- vector("list", nrow(combos_sess))
    strict_bad <- FALSE

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(combos_sess))) {
      sess <- combos_sess$session[i]
      d1 <- wide_strict %>% filter(subject == s, session == sess)
      res1 <- safe_cor(d1)

      if (is.na(res1$r) || res1$n < min_n) strict_bad <- TRUE

      strict_rows[[i]] <- data.frame(
        subject = s,
        session = sess,
        n = res1$n,
        r = res1$r,
        p = res1$p,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }

    strict_df <- bind_rows(strict_rows)

    # --- if anything failed, recompute ALL sessions for that subject using loose
    if (strict_bad) {
      loose_rows <- vector("list", nrow(combos_sess))

      for (i in seq_len(nrow(combos_sess))) {
        sess <- combos_sess$session[i]
        d2 <- wide_loose %>% filter(subject == s, session == sess)
        res2 <- safe_cor(d2)

        loose_rows[[i]] <- data.frame(
          subject = s,
          session = sess,
          n = res2$n,
          r = res2$r,
          p = res2$p,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }

      out[[s]] <- bind_rows(loose_rows) %>%
        mutate(filter_used = "loose_t2only_subjectwide")
    } else {
      out[[s]] <- strict_df %>%
        mutate(filter_used = "strict_t1t2_subjectwide")
    }
  }

  bind_rows(out)
}


# ============================================================
# Plot correlations
# ============================================================

cor_df <- compute_correlations_on_updates(
  df,
  xvar = "un",
  yvar = "l",
  time1 = 1,
  time2 = 2,
  struct_val = 1,
  sessions = c("S","D","H")
)

subject_list <- c(1:20)

session_pair <- c("S","H","D")

session_colors <- c(
  "S" = "gray",   # green
  "H" = "royalblue",   # orange
  "D" = "#E69F00"   # purple
)

cor_plot <- cor_df %>%
  filter(subject %in% subject_list,
         session %in% session_pair) %>%
  mutate(
    subject = as.character(subject),
    session = factor(session, levels = session_pair)
  )

# summary for bars
cor_plot_summary <- summarySEwithin(
  data = cor_plot,
  measurevar = "r",
  withinvars = "session",
  idvar = "subject",
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# subject pairs
pairs_df <- cor_plot %>%
  group_by(subject) %>%
  filter(n_distinct(session) == length(session_pair)) %>%
  arrange(subject, session) %>%
  ungroup()


stat.test <- cor_plot %>%
  t_test(r ~ session, paired = TRUE) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "none") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    p.signif = dplyr::case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ "ns"
    ),
    p.adj.signif = dplyr::case_when(
      p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "session")

stat.test$y.position <- c(0.6, 0.86, 0.73)

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_col(
    data = cor_plot_summary,
    aes(x = session, y = r, fill = session),
    width = 0.6, alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = cor_plot_summary,
    aes(x = session, ymin = r - se, ymax = r + se),
    width = 0.15, size = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = pairs_df, position = position_nudge(x = 0.08),
    aes(x = session, y = r, group = subject),
    color = "gray70", alpha = 0.6, size = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = cor_plot,
    aes(x = session, y = r, color = session),
    position = position_nudge(x = 0.08),
    shape = 21,
    fill = "white",
    size = 2.5,
    stroke = 0.8
  )+
  stat_pvalue_manual(
    stat.test,
    label = "p.signif",
    tip.length = 0.01, size = 8
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = session_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = session_colors) + scale_x_discrete(labels = c(D = "IFS", H = "HC", S = "Sham")) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "EXP-INF correlation"
  ) + 
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") + theme(aspect.ratio = 0.9/1, text = element_text(size = 20), axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20),
                                          axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20)) +   
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,0.5), limits = c(-1,1.007), expand = c(0, 0))

svg("figure/corr.svg",
   width =3.5,
   height = 3.5/0.9,
   antialias = "none")
print(p)
dev.off()

t.test(cor_df[cor_df$session == 'D' & cor_df$subject %in% subject_list,]$r, mu = 0, alternative = "two.sided")
t.test(cor_df[cor_df$session == 'H' & cor_df$subject %in% subject_list,]$r, mu = 0, alternative = "two.sided")
t.test(cor_df[cor_df$session == 'S' & cor_df$subject %in% subject_list,]$r, mu = 0, alternative = "two.sided")

```


# 2. rating update

```{r functions to run}

compute_deltas <- function(dfS,
                           xvar = "un",
                           yvar = "l",
                           time1 = 1,
                           time2 = 2,
                           struct_val = 1,
                           sessions = c("S","H","D")) {
  df2 <- dfS %>%
    filter(as.character(struct) == as.character(struct_val),
           as.character(session) %in% as.character(sessions)) %>%
    mutate(subject = as.character(subject),
           session = as.character(session),
           baserate = as.character(baserate),
           time = as.character(time),
           mag = mag)
  
  id_cols <- c("subject","session","baserate","trial","mag")
  wide <- df2 %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(id_cols), time, all_of(c(xvar, yvar))) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = time,
                values_from = c(!!rlang::sym(xvar), !!rlang::sym(yvar)),
                names_glue = "{.value}_t{time}")
  
  xt1 <- paste0(xvar, "_t", time1)
  xt2 <- paste0(xvar, "_t", time2)
  yt1 <- paste0(yvar, "_t", time1)
  yt2 <- paste0(yvar, "_t", time2)
  
  wide <- wide %>%
    mutate(
      delta_x = !!rlang::sym(xt2) - !!rlang::sym(xt1),
      delta_y = !!rlang::sym(yt2) - !!rlang::sym(yt1)
    ) %>%
    filter(!(is.na(delta_x) & is.na(delta_y)))
  outlier_thresh = 3
  wide_clean <- wide %>%
    group_by(subject, session, baserate) %>%
    mutate(
      zx = (delta_x - mean(delta_x, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(delta_x, na.rm = TRUE),
      zy = (delta_y - mean(delta_y, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(delta_y, na.rm = TRUE),
      zx2 =  (un_t2 - mean(un_t2, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(un_t2, na.rm = TRUE),
      zy2 =  (l_t2 - mean(l_t2, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(l_t2, na.rm = TRUE),
      zx1 =  (un_t1 - mean(un_t1, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(un_t1, na.rm = TRUE),
      zy1 =  (l_t1 - mean(l_t1, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(l_t1, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(
      (is.na(zx) | abs(zx) <= outlier_thresh) & (is.na(zx2) | abs(zx2) <= outlier_thresh) &
      (is.na(zx1) | abs(zx1) <= outlier_thresh) & (is.na(zy) | abs(zy) <= outlier_thresh) &
      (is.na(zy1) | abs(zy1) <= outlier_thresh) & (is.na(zy2) | abs(zy2) <= outlier_thresh)
    )
  
  return(wide_clean)
}


plot_delta <- function(dfS, struct_val, y_variable, session_pair, subject_list = NULL,y_limits = NULL, y_breaks = NULL,legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = NULL, plot_sig = NULL) {
  
  library(lmerTest)
  
  deltas <- compute_deltas(
    dfS,
    xvar = "un",
    yvar = "l",
    time1 = 1,
    time2 = 2,
    struct_val = struct_val,
    sessions = c("S","H","D")
  )
  
  if (!"block" %in% names(deltas)) {
    deltas <- deltas %>%
      mutate(block = if_else(subject == 1,
                             ceiling(trial / 24),
                             ceiling(trial / 22)))
  }
  
  
 deltas$y_var <- deltas[[y_variable]]
 deltas <- deltas %>%
    mutate(
      session = factor(session),
      subject = factor(subject),
      mag = factor(mag)
    ) %>% filter(subject %in% subject_list)
 
 if (!is.null(baserate_ft)) {
   deltas <- deltas %>% filter(baserate == baserate_ft)
   
 }
 
  (agg.sub <- deltas %>%
    aggregate(data=.,y_var ~ mag + subject + session, mean))
  (table_mix <- summarySEwithin(data = agg.sub, measurevar = 'y_var', withinvars = c("session","mag"), idvar = 'subject') %>%
       dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair))
  
  
  mod_data <- deltas %>% dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair)

  model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
  m1 <- lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE)
  
  anova_table <- anova(m1)
  p_val <- anova_table["session", "Pr(>F)"]
  
  get_star <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return("")
  if (p < .001) return("***")
  if (p < .01)  return("**")
  if (p < .05)  return("*")
  if (p < .1)  return("+")
  return("ns")
}
  sig_star <- get_star(p_val)

  y_label <- if (y_variable == "delta_y") {
    "EXP"
  } else if (y_variable == "delta_x") {
    "INF"
  } else {
    y_variable
  }
  

  legend_position <- switch(
  legend_pos,
  "right_top" = c(0.8, 1),
  "right_bottom" = c(0.8, 0.25),
  "right_middle" = c(0.8, 0.5),
  "none" = "none",
  c(0.85, 0.15)   # default = right bottom
)
y_title_margin <- if (y_variable == "delta_y") {
  margin(r = -2)
} 
  star_size <- if (sig_star %in% c("*", "**", "***")) 12 else 10
  p<-ggplot(agg.sub, aes(x = mag, y = y_var, color = session)) +
    geom_line(data = table_mix, aes(group = session), size = 1.2) +
    geom_errorbar(data = table_mix,
                  aes(ymin = y_var - se, ymax = y_var + se),
                  width = .2, size = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = session_colors,
  labels = c(D = "IFS", H = "HC", S = "Sham"))  +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(title = "",
      x = "Magnitude",
      y = y_label
    ) + 
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
      aspect.ratio = 0.8/1,
      text = element_text(size = 25, family = "Arial"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 25),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.position = legend_position,
      legend.text = element_text(size = 25),
      legend.background = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
       axis.ticks.length = unit(4, "pt")
    ) + scale_y_continuous(
    limits = y_limits,
    breaks = y_breaks, expand = c(0, 0)
    )  
  # if (y_variable == "delta_x") {
  #   p<-p + theme(axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = -6)))
  # }
  if (is.null(plot_sig)) {
    p<- p+annotate("text", x = (length(levels(mod_data$mag)) + 1) / 2,
             y = Inf,
             label = sig_star,
             hjust = 1.1,
             vjust = 1.5,
             size = star_size) 
  }
  return(p)
}


plot_pair_interaction <- function(dat, pair, y_limits = c(-60, -29.9), y_breaks = seq(-60,-30,10), y_lab = -32, baserate_ft = NULL) {
   if (!is.null(baserate_ft)) {
   dat <- dat %>% filter(baserate == baserate_ft)
   
    }
  dat_pair <- dat %>%
    filter(session %in% pair) %>%
    mutate(
      session = factor(session, levels = pair),
      mag = if (is.factor(mag) || is.character(mag)) {
        as.numeric(as.character(mag))
      } else {
        as.numeric(mag)
      }
    )
  model_formula <- delta_x ~ session * mag + (session+mag| subject)

  fit <- lmer(model_formula, data = dat_pair, REML = TRUE)

  # predicted values for each session
  df <- ggpredict(fit, terms = c("mag", "session"), ci.lvl = 0.68)

  # test whether the mag slope differs between sessions
  tr <- emtrends(fit, specs = ~ session, var = "mag")
  pw <- as.data.frame(pairs(tr, adjust = "none"))
  pval <- pw$p.value[1]

  sig_lab <- if (pval < 0.001) {
    "***"
  } else if (pval < 0.01) {
    "**"
  } else if (pval < 0.05) {
    "*"
  } else if (pval < 0.1) {
    "+" 
  } else {
    "ns"
  }

  # label position
  x_lab <- mean(range(df$x, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  star_size <- if (sig_lab %in% c("*", "**", "***")) 12 else 10
  ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = predicted)) +
    geom_line(
      aes(color = group),
      linewidth = 1.2
    ) +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = x_lab,
      y = y_lab,
      label = sig_lab,
      size = star_size
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = session_colors[pair], name = "", labels = c(D = "IFS", H = "HC", S = "Sham")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = session_colors[pair])  +
    labs(
      x = "Magnitude",
      y = "INF",
      title = ""
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 26),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 26),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 26),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = c(0.8, 0.9),
      legend.background = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 26),
      rect = element_rect(size = 2,  color = "black"),  
      axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.ticks.length = unit(4, "pt"),     
      aspect.ratio = 1 / 1
    ) +  scale_y_continuous(breaks = y_breaks,limits = y_limits) + guides(color = "none", fill = "none")
}


```


```{R load data}
# Analyses focused on BB trials (struct == 1) 
deltas <- compute_deltas(df, xvar = "un", yvar = "l", time1 = 1, time2 = 2, struct_val = 1,
                         sessions = c("S","H","D"))   # include whichever sessions you want
# --- PREP: ensure block exists and prepare data ---
if (!"block" %in% names(deltas)) {
  deltas <- deltas %>%
    mutate(block = if_else(subject == 1,
                           ceiling(trial / 24),
                           ceiling(trial / 22)))
}
deltas <- deltas %>%
  mutate(
    session = factor(session), # S is reference
    subject = factor(subject),
    mag_re = mag,
    mag = factor(mag)
  ) 

```

```{R EXP under low baserates condition - HC vs IFS}
# H and D
# baserate == 1
session_pair = c('H','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))

svg("figure/exp_hd_1.svg",
    width =4,
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(20, 50.14),
  y_breaks = seq(20,50,10), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = '1'))
dev.off()

```

```{r EXP - supplementary: Sham vs IFS and Sham vs HC}

session_pair = c('S','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/exp_sd_1.svg", 
    width =4, 
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")  # Prevents font smoothing changes
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(20, 50.14),
  y_breaks = seq(20,50,10), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = '1'))
dev.off()

session_pair = c('S','H')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))

svg("figure/exp_sh_1.svg", 
    width =4, 
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")  # Prevents font smoothing changes
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(20, 50.14),
  y_breaks = seq(20,50,10), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = '1'))
dev.off()


```

```{r INF difference across sessions}

## across baserate conditions
# S and H

session_pair = c('S','H')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag) 
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inf_sh.svg",
    width =4,
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-50, -24.9),
  y_breaks = seq(-50,-25,25), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = NULL, plot_sig = 1))
dev.off()

# S and D
session_pair = c('S','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inf_sd.svg", 
    width =4, 
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")  
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-50, -24.9),
  y_breaks = seq(-50,-25,25), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = NULL, plot_sig = 1))
dev.off()

# H and D
session_pair = c('H','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inf_hd.svg", 
    width =4, 
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")  
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-50, -24.9),
  y_breaks = seq(-50,-25,25), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = NULL, plot_sig = 1))
dev.off()



## baserate == '1' (low baserate condition)
# S and H
session_pair = c('S','H')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inf_sh1.svg",
    width =4,
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-60, -29.85),
  y_breaks = seq(-60,-30,10), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = '1', plot_sig = 1))
dev.off()

# S and D
session_pair = c('S','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inf_sd1.svg", 
    width =4, 
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")  
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-60, -29.85),
  y_breaks = seq(-60,-30,10), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = '1', plot_sig = 1))
dev.off()

# H and D
session_pair = c('H','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inf_hd1.svg", 
    width =4, 
    height = 4/0.8,
    antialias = "none")  
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-60, -29.85),
  y_breaks = seq(-60,-30,10), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = '1', plot_sig = 1))
dev.off()

```

```{R magnitude x tus session interaction: IFS vs HC}
# test magnitude x tus session interaction

model_formula <- y_var~session*as.numeric(mag)+(session+as.numeric(mag) |subject)
session_pair = c('D','H')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x

# across baserate
summary(lmer(model_formula,data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
# baserate == '1'
summary(lmer(model_formula,data = mod_data[mod_data$baserate=='1',], REML = TRUE))

## visualise interaction effect
# across baserates
svg("figure/inter_hd.svg", 
    width = 3.8, 
    height = 3.8/1,
    antialias = "none")
plot_pair_interaction(deltas, c("H", "D"), y_limits = c(-50, -30), y_breaks = seq(-50, -30, 10), y_lab = -35)
dev.off()

# baserate == '1'
svg("figure/inter_hd1.svg", 
    width = 3.8, 
    height = 3.8/1,
    antialias = "none")

plot_pair_interaction(deltas, c("H", "D"), y_limits = c(-60, -30), y_breaks = seq(-60,-30,10), y_lab = -40, baserate_ft = '1')
dev.off()
```

```{R supplementray: magnitude x TUS session interaction - Sham vs IFS and Sham vs HC}

model_formula <- y_var~session*as.numeric(mag)+(session+as.numeric(mag) |subject)
session_pair = c('S','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x

# across baserate
summary(lmer(model_formula,data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inter_sd.svg", 
    width = 3.8, 
    height = 3.8/1,
    antialias = "none")
plot_pair_interaction(deltas, c("D", "S"), y_limits = c(-50, -30), y_breaks = seq(-50, -30, 10), y_lab = -35)
dev.off()

# baserate == '1'
summary(lmer(model_formula,data = mod_data[mod_data$baserate=='1',], REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inter_sd1.svg", 
    width = 3.8, 
    height = 3.8/1,
    antialias = "none")
plot_pair_interaction(deltas, c("D", "S"), y_limits = c(-60, -30), y_breaks = seq(-60,-30,10), y_lab = -40,baserate_ft = '1')
dev.off()

model_formula <- y_var~session*as.numeric(mag)+(session+as.numeric(mag) |subject)
session_pair = c('S','H')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x

# across baserate
summary(lmer(model_formula,data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inter_sh.svg", 
    width = 3.8, 
    height = 3.8/1,
    antialias = "none")
plot_pair_interaction(deltas, c("H", "S"), y_limits = c(-50, -30), y_breaks = seq(-50, -30, 10), y_lab = -35)
dev.off()

# baserate == '1'
summary(lmer(model_formula,data = mod_data[mod_data$baserate=='1',], REML = TRUE))
svg("figure/inter_sh1.svg", 
    width = 3.8, 
    height = 3.8/1,
    antialias = "none")
plot_pair_interaction(deltas, c("H", "S"), y_limits = c(-60, -30), y_breaks = seq(-60,-30,10), y_lab = -40,baserate_ft = '1')
dev.off()
```


# supplementary figures

```{r BB: EXP across baserates}
deltas <- compute_deltas(df, xvar = "un", yvar = "l", time1 = 1, time2 = 2, struct_val = 1,
                         sessions = c("S","H","D"))   # include whichever sessions you want

if (!"block" %in% names(deltas)) {
  deltas <- deltas %>%
    mutate(block = if_else(subject == 1,
                           ceiling(trial / 24),
                           ceiling(trial / 22)))
}
deltas <- deltas %>%
  mutate(
    session = factor(session), # S is reference
    subject = factor(subject),
    mag_re = mag,
    mag = factor(mag)
  ) 

# S and H
session_pair = c('S','H')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag) 
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
# svg("figure/exp_sh.svg", 
#     width =4, 
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none") 
p1 <- plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(15, 45),
  y_breaks = seq(15,45,15), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = NULL)
print(p1)
# dev.off()

# S and D
session_pair = c('S','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))

# svg("figure/exp_sd.svg", 
#     width =4, 
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none") 
p2 <- plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(15, 45),
  y_breaks = seq(15,45,15), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = NULL)
print(p2)
# dev.off()


# H and D
session_pair = c('H','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair) 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))

# svg("figure/exp_hd.svg", 
#     width =4, 
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none") 
p3 <- plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(15, 45),
  y_breaks = seq(15,45,15), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = NULL)
print(p3)
# dev.off()

```

```{r BB: EXP under high baserate condition}
# baserate == 3
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '3') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))

# svg("figure/exp_hd_3.svg", 
#     width =4, 
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none")  # Prevents font smoothing changes
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(15, 40.14),
  y_breaks = seq(15,40,5), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = '3'))
#dev.off()




session_pair = c('S','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
# svg("figure/exp_sd_3.svg", 
#     width =4, 
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none") 
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(15, 40.14),
  y_breaks = seq(15,40,5), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = '3'))
# dev.off()

session_pair = c('S','H')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_y
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))

# svg("figure/exp_sh_3.svg", 
#     width =4, 
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none") 
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_y", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(15, 40.14),
  y_breaks = seq(15,40,5), legend_pos = "right_bottom", baserate_ft = '3'))
# dev.off()

```

```{R BB: INF under high baserate condition}


## baserate == '1' (low baserate condition)
# S and H
session_pair = c('S','H')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
# svg("figure/inf_sh3.svg",
#     width =4,
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none")
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-50, -19.85),
  y_breaks = seq(-50,-20,10), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = '3', plot_sig = 1))
# dev.off()

# S and D
session_pair = c('S','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
# svg("figure/inf_sd3.svg", 
#     width =4, 
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none")  
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-50, -19.85),
  y_breaks = seq(-50,-20,10), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = '3', plot_sig = 1))
# dev.off()

# H and D
session_pair = c('H','D')
mod_data <- deltas %>%
  dplyr::filter(session %in% session_pair & baserate == '1') 
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
mod_data$y_var <- mod_data$delta_x
model_formula <- y_var ~ session + (1|subject) + (1|subject:mag)
summary(lmer(model_formula, data = mod_data, REML = TRUE))
# svg("figure/inf_hd3.svg", 
#     width =4, 
#     height = 4/0.8,
#     antialias = "none")  
print(plot_delta(df, 1, "delta_x", session_pair, subject_list, y_limits = c(-50, -19.85),
  y_breaks = seq(-50,-20,10), legend_pos = "right_top", baserate_ft = '3', plot_sig = 1))
# dev.off()

```
